title: Occupied Cinema
overview: The "Occupied Cinema" follows young activists and events surrounding the takeover of "Zvezda", one of 14 extinguished cinemas from the privatized company "Beograd Film".

trailers.title: Okupirani Bioskop (2018) - Trailer | BELDOCS 2018
trailers.channel_name: BELDOCS - International Documentary Film Festival Belgrade
